decision_rationale: Technically this is not a keep decision for an applied change: no behavioral change was made, so predicted fixes cannot be confirmed. The proposal remains directionally appropriate and scoped to the identified command-level root cause, while future application should preserve the documented risk constraints and be re-measured before any keep attribution.

predicted_fixes.reason: The proposed change was not applied; post-evaluation explicitly treats verification of applied-change fixes as not_run. The original `/feature` fail remains expected in no-change mode.
No change was applied to `commands/feature.md`; the post-evaluation observes that it still lists researcher before designer and still lacks the exact local base-flow declaration.

risk_tasks.reason: No change was applied, so no new serialization behavior was introduced. If applied later, wording must avoid making design/research sequencing unnecessarily rigid for independent tasks.
The second measurement confirms sidecar pass states remain expected in no-change mode. Future application must not convert evaluator/debugger/evolver into normal `/feature` phases.
No tracked behavioral diff was observed. If applied later, the change should remain limited to the `/feature` command documentation because the root cause is localized there.

regressions.summary: No new regressions were observed in the no-change measurement; the original `/feature` discrepancy persists as expected because the manifest was not applied.

changes.next_handoff: If the proposal is later approved and implemented, rerun static evaluation against `/feature`, `/scope`, `/evolve`, and sidecar optionality before converting this attribution to keep or rollback+pivot.

overall_regressions.summary: None newly observed; no behavioral changes were applied.

handoff.specifier_or_evolver: Treat the manifest as a proposed-only, directionally valid command-level change, not as a confirmed fix.
handoff.developer: No developer action occurred in this iteration; do not infer applied-change success from this attribution.
handoff.reviewer: Verify this artifact is evidence-only and that behavior files remain unmodified before accepting the iteration record.
